# Dragus Enterprises

> Technology consulting firm specializing in Telecommunications, AI Development, and System Integration. Tagline: Technology for the Modern Age.

Dragus Enterprises helps businesses of all sizes modernize their technology infrastructure. We provide expert consulting and implementation services across telecommunications, artificial intelligence, and systems integration — delivering solutions that run reliably, scale confidently, and integrate with existing operations.

## Services

- **Telecommunications Consulting**: Audit, design, procurement, and lifecycle management of voice, data, and unified communication networks. Specializing in carrier procurement, network modernization, and uptime-first architecture.
- **AI Development**: Custom intelligent automation, predictive models, and AI-augmented workflows. We build AI systems that integrate into existing operations without disrupting them.
- **System Integration**: Connecting legacy and modern platforms through secure, observable pipelines. We eliminate technology silos and unlock the full value of your existing tech stack.

## Company

- **Full name**: Dragus Enterprises
- **Website**: https://www.dragusent.com
- **Email**: admin@dragusent.com

- **Service area**: Available worldwide
- **Industry**: Telecommunications Consulting, System Integration, Artificial Intelligence Development

## Technology Partners

- EmetroTel - Unified communications and migration
- Yeastar - Cloud PBX and collaboration
- Yealink - Endpoints and video conferencing
- AWS - Cloud infrastructure

## Key Facts

- Delivered 150+ systems
- Targets 99.99% uptime
- Operates globally
- Approach: Audit, Roadmap, Implementation
